title: Integration Feedback Event Store
description: Cross-run knowledge base for dev-integrate conflicts and integration failures. Consumed by dev-decompose --dry-run (to bias file-boundary decisions) and dev-flow-doctor (to warn about recurring conflict patterns).

version.description: Schema version. Readers MUST fall back to an empty event list if version is unknown.

events.description: Append-only event log. Older entries may be trimmed once the total exceeds max_events (default 500).

id.description: Unique event id (ev_001, ev_002, ...), generated by integration-event-append.sh

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 time the event was recorded

source_issue.description: GitHub issue number that produced this event

files.description: Files involved (conflict markers, type-check failures, etc.)

subtask_pair.description: Two or more subtask IDs involved in the incident (optional)
